degraded.reason: Pre-existing sweep-outbox warning from setup_iterate_worktree (trg-671bb0a2: a status append dropped by a prior merge) — unrelated to this change; non-fatal, worktree created.

Unit count 4082 = iterate-plugin suite (443) + shared suites (shared/tests 3413, shared/scripts/tests 175, shared/scripts/tools/tests 51). Other plugins' suites not re-run: this diff is iterate-local + docs and touches no shared/ code, so they are unaffected; CI re-runs every plugin suite.

surface_verification.justification: Iterate-internal framework tooling: a new classify_intent mode + behavior_snapshot.py gate + F-simplify.md sub-skill + guide docs. No web/CLI/API surface of its own is introduced; the contract IS the snapshot/verify gate, driven mechanically by the probe suite (tests/test_behavior_snapshot_cli.py: clean simplify->green, drift->reject, removed-coverage->reject, red-baseline->refuse) + unit verdict matrix + round-trip, all green at F0.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 classify_intent returns additive mode='simplify' (type='change') for simplify vocab; refactor stays change/no-mode; bug fix wins over simplify; none keeps mode key
behaviors.evidence: test_classify_intent.py::TestSimplifyMode (all cases) + parametrized test_every_simplify_keyword/phrase_triggers_mode + test_change_keywords (refactor no-mode) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC2 F-simplify.md carries the Five Principles + Chesterton-Fence + 'fewer lines is not the goal' + MIT attribution + <=400 LOC
AC3 SKILL.md routes SIMPLIFY through F-simplify (link resolves) + states behavior-preserving gate; net-zero Kern LOC
AC4 snapshot stores green-state (node-id set + counts + exit + LOC) and refuses a red baseline (exit 2)
AC5 verify STOPs on test flip / removed coverage / count drop / loc-drop+coverage-loss; loc-drop-alone passes
AC6 producer->file->consumer round-trip: green-state record byte-faithful; deserialized record reproduces the live verdict (touches_io_boundary Boundary Probe)
AC7 probe-iterate both arms: clean simplify->green; behavior drift (covered path) + removed coverage->rejected
AC8 docs/guide.md documents the simplify sub-mode (Behavior-Snapshot wrap + behavior_snapshot.py + 'fewer lines is not the goal')
Review-fix: empty node-ids degrade the gate to green/red only -> snapshot WARNs + records node_ids_collected=false (no silent half-gate)
INTEGRATION: full snapshot->edit->verify CLI cycle composes against a real synthetic pytest project (the default verify replays the snapshot's stored command symmetrically)
